titleStmt.title: SII 10.370: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 370. (A.R. No. 208 of 1905.) ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME ROOM. Ś. 1181.

summary.p: States that Gaṇḍapeṇḍāru Jannigadēva-Mahārāja, feudatory of Gaṇapati, the Kākatīya king, gave the village of Gaṇḍrakōṭa-Anuṅgurājupalli in the Palināṇḍu to god Tripurāntakadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśubhaśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1181 Agu nēṁṭi sādhāraṇa
saṁvatsara kārttika ba 15 gu . nāṁṭi puṇyakālamaṁdu sva
sti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara mūrurāya jagadaḷa kākatī
yagaṇapatidēvadivyaśrīpādapadmōpajīvi yaina śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍalēśvara gaṁḍapeṁḍāru jannigadēvamahārājulu ta
makuṁ buṇyamugānu svasti śrītripurāṁtakadēvara Aṁgaraṁ
gabhōgālaku palināṁṭilōnu gaṁḍrakōṭa Anuṁgurājupalli ca
tussīmamūnu sakalāyasahitamugānu dhārāpūrvaka
mu sēsi Iśtimi . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vanu
ṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi varuṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētuḥ nṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvānētāṁ bhāvi
naḥ pārtthivēṁdrāN bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . hērakṣakāḥ kalayata tripurāṁtakasya
tīrtthasya kōkilabilādhipabhairavēśa . dēvi trilōkaviditē tripurēkarāḷikāḷi śmasānatalavāsini bhadra
kāḷi . sādhāraṇaṁ sukṛtayētadaśēṣarājñāṁ rakṣaṁti yē śirasi taccaraṇadvayīmē . tānyāca
yā ma pyavatayē kilanāśayaṁtō bhakṣam bhavaṁtu bhuvi tē niyataṁ kṣaṇādyaḥ .
Note:—Either the Śaka year or the cyclic year is incorrectly mentioned.
Digital edition of SII 10.370 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
